name: distribution-engineering
description: Get your product seen and adopted as an engineered, compounding system.

interface.shortDescription: Brand, distribution, and a compounding content memory for getting products seen.
interface.longDescription: Distribution Engineering is the marketing-side analog of compound engineering: a suite of skills that treat getting a product seen and adopted as an engineered, compounding system. Define brand voice and positioning, build channel playbooks, and capture what each post taught you so future content is faster and data-informed.
defaultPrompt: /de-brand define this product's voice and positioning
